wwilp|Landau's Problemswwigrwwilegwwin2p1wwitp|wwiabc|wwirh

Researchers across multiple conjectures

People in this directory who also appear on another of our conjecture sites

The Who's Who project keeps a separate directory for each conjecture: wwilp (wwilp.org), wwigr (wwigr.org), wwileg (wwileg.org), wwin2p1 (wwin2p1.org), wwitp (wwitp.org), wwiabc (wwiabc.org), wwirh (wwirh.org). This page lists the researchers who rank on wwirh and on at least one other conjecture. Each name links to that person's profile on this site; under each conjecture's column, their rank there is shown as #N (linked to that site's profile when one exists).

Filter: the wwirh column is fixed on (this is its site). Tick another conjecture's box to narrow the list to people who appear on both; tick several to require all of them at once (an AND filter). Untick to widen again. The filter runs in your browser, no reload needed. rows shown.

A rank shown as #N is that researcher's position on that conjecture's Top 100, and links to their profile there. A plain #N (no link) means they sit just outside that site's Top 100, in its extended pool. A blank cell means they do not appear on that site.

Maintained by Steve Hubbard (admin@wwirh.org). Data sources: arXiv, OpenAlex, zbMATH Open, Mathematics Genealogy Project.

Last built June 2026.
